conversations.jd_after_snapshot:
# Service Executive

## About Us
WOGOM is a B2B Commerce and Retail Enablement Platform, empowering 6,000+ retailers and 450+ sellers across India. Our goal is to build a connected ecosystem where technology, capital, and commerce converge to help Indian retailers scale with confidence.

## Role Overview
The Service Executive role is designed for a skilled service professional with a strong background in white goods product understanding and spare parts management. This role will deliver high-quality customer service and ensure effective spare parts management.

## Key Responsibilities
• Analyze and resolve complex technical issues with white goods products, working closely with the service team.
• Manage spare parts inventory and optimize usage, developing strategies to minimize costs.
• Develop and share best practices across the service team to ensure consistent customer service.
• Manage a team of service technicians, providing guidance and support.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure alignment and effective communication.
• Review key performance indicators (KPIs) to identify areas for improvement.

## Requirements
### Must-Have Skills
• White goods product understanding and technical specifications.
• Spare parts management and inventory control.
• Customer service skills and a customer-centric mindset.
• Technical expertise in white goods products.
• Analytical skills to analyze data and make informed decisions.

### Nice-to-Have Skills
• Excel skills to analyze and present data.
• Service CRM skills to manage customer interactions and service requests.

## Who Will Succeed in This Role
The ideal candidate will have a collaborative mindset, an analytical mindset, and a strong customer-centric mindset. They will have a proven track record of delivering high-quality customer service and be able to work effectively with cross-functional teams.

conversations.user_instruction: add "working with operations and service teams" in key responsibilites

# Service Executive

## About Us
WOGOM is a B2B Commerce and Retail Enablement Platform, empowering 6,000+ retailers and 450+ sellers across India. Our goal is to build a connected ecosystem where technology, capital, and commerce converge to help Indian retailers scale with confidence.

## Role Overview
The Service Executive role is designed for a skilled service professional with a strong background in white goods product understanding and spare parts management. This role will deliver high-quality customer service and ensure effective spare parts management.

## Key Responsibilities
• Analyze and resolve complex technical issues with white goods products, working closely with the service team.
• Manage spare parts inventory and optimize usage, developing strategies to minimize costs.
• Develop and share best practices across the service team to ensure consistent customer service.
• Manage a team of service technicians, providing guidance and support.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including working with operations and service teams, to ensure alignment and effective communication.
• Review key performance indicators (KPIs) to identify areas for improvement.

## Requirements
### Must-Have Skills
• White goods product understanding and technical specifications.
• Spare parts management and inventory control.
• Customer service skills and a customer-centric mindset.
• Technical expertise in white goods products.
• Analytical skills to analyze data and make informed decisions.

### Nice-to-Have Skills
• Excel skills to analyze and present data.
• Service CRM skills to manage customer interactions and service requests.

## Who Will Succeed in This Role
The ideal candidate will have a collaborative mindset, an analytical mindset, and a strong customer-centric mindset. They will have a proven track record of delivering high-quality customer service and be able to work effectively with cross-functional teams.
